https://forum-en.msi.com/index.php?topic=310147.0
If you want to do a clean install of Windows on the SX8200, do that (do not fear about your Windows licence it shall be automatically reused):
- Download the last release (1803) of Windows 10: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/software-download/windows10. Runt it and choose to create an USB pen (you will need an empty pen with at least 8GB).
- Shutdown and power off.
- Unplug all disks except the SX8200 drive where you want to install Windows (to be certain that all required partitions [boot loader, OS and backup partitions] will be created on it).
- Plug the USB flash drive in one USB2.0 port on the back panel (those below the PS/2 port).
- Power on and enter in Bios Setup (keep pressed during the pc start), press , confirm, set "SETTINGS \ Advanced \ Windows OS Configuration \ Windows 8.1/ 10 WHQL Support"="Enabled" (set automatically boot mode at UEFI), press and confirm.
- PC should reboot and begin Windows install. Select "Custom" as installation type. If there is already partitions on the SX8200 drive, select each of them then select "Delete". When all partitions are deleted, select the unallocated space and click "Next" (not "New", only "Next"). Because there is no partition on the drive and PC was booted into UEFI mode, Windows should (re)initialize the drive as GPT then begin the installation.
- After the installation, wait the Windows updates end.
Good courage,

From Google
The solution that I got to work is as follows:
Disable CSM / UEFI
Enable Secure Boot
Now the installer can access the NVME SSD
Format the drive
Restart the machine
Enable CSM / UEFI
Disable Secure Boot
Proceed to installer and now Windows will allow you to install to the NVME SSD drive

官網下載nvme個driver 用7Zip解壓
成個File Copy落USB
揀HDD個頁有掣可以入Driver
揀File入面個inf檔就得
(例如 XXXX_nvme_driver\win10\driver.inf)

或者可以試下全部SATA唔插
之前我試過SATA有條channel撞 插第二個SATA位就解決咗

replies.msg: windows 裝落 HDD 先再用 macrium reflect clone 落隻 m2 試下，睇下個軟件認唔認到隻 m2, 唔得嘅話隻 m2 應該壞左

按「Shift」＋「F10」組合鍵開啟「cmd 」。
用輸入「diskpart 」。

輸入「List disk」

輸入「select disk (入返SSD號碼)」

輸入「clean」洗咗佢

輸入「convert gpt」

關閉「cmd」同「重新啟動電腦」

有咩error係到講 祝你好運👍🏻

按「Shift」＋「F10」組合鍵開啟「cmd 」。
用輸入「diskpart 」。

輸入「List disk」

輸入「select disk (入返SSD號碼)」

輸入「clean」洗咗佢

輸入「convert gpt」

關閉「cmd」同「重新啟動電腦」

replies.msg:
認真答你，我都買咗同你應該同款嘅SSD。

個症狀會係以下情況：

當見唔到SSD，熄咗部電腦佢，等五六分鐘左右，然後開機，就會入到Windows見到SSD.

然後見到SSD，就算你喺Windows入邊正規重新開機定係手動用機箱用重新開機制，就會連入BIOS都見唔到SSD

到最後我解決嘅方法，打算去保養換一條新嘅。
保養亦都換咗條比我。但係兩個星期先有。

再上返部電腦，都係出現同樣問題，我同樣用同一個型號去Google search都有唔少人都有需求問題。

以上上面任何測試，我分別試過用唔同平台

包括唔同牌子底板，唔同m.2 slot位。

都出現同樣情況。


如果樓豬有解決方法 update post話我知。

Btw 我唔會再貪平買依隻牌子。
